I'll definitely go for a 4X and maybe even a 3X sooner or later.

***The Monkey*** is a 2025 American [comedy horror](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Comedy_horror "Comedy horror") film[[7]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Monkey_(film)#cite_note-EntertainmentWeekly-7) written and directed by [Osgood Perkins](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Osgood_Perkins "Osgood Perkins"). Based on [Stephen King](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Stephen_King "Stephen King")'s [1980 short story](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Monkey "The Monkey"), the film stars [Theo James](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Theo_James "Theo James") in a [dual role](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dual_role "Dual role") as twin brothers whose lives are turned upside down by a cursed [toy monkey](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cymbal-banging_monkey_toy "Cymbal-banging monkey toy") that causes random horrific deaths around them. [Tatiana Maslany](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tatiana_Maslany "Tatiana Maslany"), [Christian Convery](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Christian_Convery "Christian Convery"), [Colin O'Brien](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Colin_O%27Brien_(actor) "Colin O'Brien (actor)"), [Rohan Campbell](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rohan_Campbell "Rohan Campbell"), [Sarah Levy](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sarah_Levy_(actress) "Sarah Levy (actress)"), [Adam Scott](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Adam_Scott "Adam Scott"), and [Elijah Wood](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Elijah_Wood "Elijah Wood") also star.

*The Monkey* was theatrically released in the United States by [Neon](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Neon_(company) "Neon (company)") on February 21, 2025. The film received generally positive reviews from critics and has grossed $68.9 million worldwide against a budget of $10–11 million.[[4]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Monkey_(film)#cite_note-budget-4)
